comment: CIFAR-10 frozen protocol: non-analogical HP/transform control
prompt: Task: Improve this weak CIFAR-10 model without using any source model.
Keep the target Python architecture unchanged.
Only choose training hyperparameters and transform.

- The <edit> JSON must be exactly mode hp_transform_only.

comment: CIFAR-10 frozen protocol: analogical source HP/transform transfer

Convert the source_hp dictionary to valid JSON with double quotes.
